spell.name: Unity
spell.text: You put up a united defense. Each ally can use your saving throw modifier instead of its own against the triggering spell. Each ally decides individually which modifier to use.
spell.trigger: You and 1 or more allies within range are targeted by a spell or ability that allows a saving throw
spell.targets: each ally targeted by the triggering spell
